'''Oracle Base''' was a top secret base of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] on [[Tel III]] in the [[Tel Minor system/Legends|Tel Minor system]]. It was the base of operations for all Rebel operations in [[Brak sector/Legends|Brak sector]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

[[General/Legends|General]] [[Trep Reskan]] was the commanding officer of Oracle Base. [[Will Scotian/Legends|Will Scotian]] also served at the base before joining [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]].
